positive: A stylized, minimalist jungle animal silhouette composition featuring a leaping jaguar and exotic tropical foliage. The jaguar is captured in mid-leap, showcasing dynamic motion and sleek musculature. The jungle elements should include monstera leaves, heliconia flowers, and winding jungle vines, all rendered in deep emerald, jungle green, and contrasting cream lines. The overall style must be highly contrasted, clean-line vector art with a strong, graphic impact, suitable for screen printing on apparel. The composition must be perfectly balanced and centered, ensuring excellent readability and print fidelity.
